note: The chocr regex hit 'CABRER\ (oobeunacion ue)' is a heavily OCR-mangled rendering of 'CABRERA (gobernación de)' — an ancient jurisdicción in León (part. jud. Ponferrada), NOT a Balearic entry. The Balearic content on this leaf is only the tail of the CABRERA (isla de) article begun on leaf 59, which is recorded there.
